_finding: SURVIVE-THE-DELETE discriminator: intervening TMS flush between unstage and kill — act STILL survives (oracle ROBS('tgt') fires two firings post-delete, in salience position). Kills the flush-window reading; with a1 pins P-STATUS/origin.
drl:
rule "RJ"
salience 20
when
    T0(f0 == true)
then
    insertLogical(new T1("tgt", true));
end
rule "RKS"
salience 10
when
    $p : T1(f0 == "tgt", f1 == true)
    $arm : T1(f0 == "ks_arm", f1 == false)
then
    delete($p);
    delete($arm);
end
rule "RMID"
salience 5
when
    T1(f0 == "mid_arm", f1 == false)
then
    insertLogical(new T1("mid", false));
end
rule "RD"
salience 3
when
    $p : T1(f0 == "tgt", f1 == true)
then
    delete($p);
end
rule "ROBS"
when
    T1($x : f0, $y : f1)
then
end
name: ird_b2_unstage_stale
